headline: Morgan Stanley Opens AI Access To Equity Platforms To Deepen Client Ties
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) plans to let external artificial intelligence agents directly connect to its stock-plan administration platforms. The bank is opening its ShareWorks and Equity Edge systems so clients can automate complex equity compensation tasks through their own AI tools. This move makes Morgan Stanley the first major bank to offer this type of external AI access, going beyond internal-only AI use reported at some peers. Morgan Stanley, a large global financial services company,...

headline: How The TWFG (TWFG) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI And Slower Growth Concerns
summary: The latest update to the TWFG story comes with a reset in modeled fair value, as the price target moves from US$25.71 to US$24.29. Street research has taken a more cautious tone, with several firms trimming targets after Q1 while reassessing how AI risks, organic growth trends, and sector premium patterns affect the stock's risk and reward trade off. Read on to see what is driving this shift and how you can track the evolving analyst narrative from here. Analyst Price Targets don't always...
